title: Tower T80837 Essentials 24cm Casserole Dish with Encapsulated Base & Tempered Glass Lid, Mirror Finish Interior & Exterior, Induction Compatible, Stainless Steel, Silver
features: HIGH GRADE STAINLESS STEEL: Expertly crafted from high grade stainless steel, this casserole is durable and built to last. The strong stainless steel is resistant to dents and scratches making it perfect for everyday use
ENCAPSULATED BASE: Encapsulated base offers quick & even heat distribution so food is perfectly cooked with no hot spots, allowing you to create delicious meals in no time
SUITABLE FOR ALL HOB TYPES: The casserole can safely used on any hob type, including induction for versatility, whilst it is also oven safe up to 200°C so you can add the finishing touches to meals
DISHWASHER SAFE: The casserole & lid can be safely used in the dishwasher for simple & fuss-free cleaning, though handwash is recommended to maintain the pristine finish
5 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a 1 year guarantee & optional 4 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Tower Essentials Casserole Dish Offering a 24cm capacity and a 6 litre capacity, this non-stick stainless steel casserole dish is ideal for creating delicious home-cooked meals. Sturdy, Efficient and Versatile This casserole dish is made from sturdy stainless steel with an elegant mirror finish, and boasts a glass lid, for accurate cooking, and riveted silicone-covered handles, for added control when handling. This makes it a sturdy, efficient and versatile addition to any kitchen. Ideal for Family Cooking Offering a 24cm diameter and 6 litre capacity, this casserole dish is ideal for creating a variety of different meals for one person or the whole family. Easy to Clean This casserole dish is fully dishwasher safe, making it easy and convenient to clean before and after use. Alternatively, the dish can be cleaned with a simple hand-wash. Oven Safe up to 200 Degrees Dishwasher Friendly Suitable for All Hobs
